text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, Brian? Anything you want me to get for
you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why the sudden ask? If it's about my birthday,
you already wished me a happy birthday at
midnight. That's enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, it's not enough for me. I've already ordered your cake, and I have our parents' gifts for you here as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I also planned to prepare a present for
you, but I thought I'd ask you what you wanted in
person this year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I say this every year, but aren't you making too
much of a fuss?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We're not kids anymore. No need to overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? Today's my sister's
birthday, and I plan on celebrating it. Now hurry
up and tell me what you want for your present.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Then run with me. That's all I need.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can do that anytime. Don't you have anything
more special you want for your birthday?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Once I figure out your present, we can start the
party. I've already sent invitations to all of our
friends, and the decorations are also up. In
theory, we should be just about ready—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's what I mean by overdoing it, Sis.
